light.label: Light
light.description: Bright clinical workspace for daytime use.

dark.label: Dark
dark.description: Low-glare mode for extended chart review.

Sidebar.patientsDescription: Clinic census and patient workflow queue.
Sidebar.wardMapDescription: Interactive room layout and patient bed placement board.
Sidebar.visitDescription: Mobile rounds cards and A4 visit-sheet printing.
Sidebar.settingsDescription: Tenant preferences, conventions, and clinic setup.

PatientsPage.title: Patient workflows
PatientsPage.description: Monitor bed assignments, clinical dates, and diagnosis updates while keeping full patient names local to each workstation.
PatientsPage.lockedDescription: Usage is currently {patientCount} / {patientLimit} patients, so patient workflows remain view-only until the clinic upgrades.
PatientsPage.censusDescription: Tenant-isolated patient records from Convex, merged with local bedside names through the roster privacy engine.

PatientTable.selectOrganization: Select a clinic organization to load tenant-isolated patient data.
PatientTable.empty: No patient records have been added for this organization yet.
PatientTable.localRosterNotSynced: Local roster not synced for this bed

WardMap.title: Ward map
WardMap.selectOrganization: Select a clinic organization to load the interactive ward layout.
WardMap.noLayoutDescription: Build the room list first so the map can generate droppable bed slots.
WardMap.heroDescription: Drag patient cards into empty beds for immediate local feedback while the updated placement is saved back to Convex in the background.
WardMap.placementDescription: Drag from here when a patient does not already match a generated bed ID.
WardMap.placementEmpty: All patients are currently placed into configured beds.

toasts.missingContext: Select an organization and sign in before moving patients.
toasts.crossOrganization: You cannot move a patient outside your organization.

PatientSheet.description: Full patient names never enter Convex. This form derives masked initials locally, stores only a 4-character identifier, and keeps the bedside name in browser storage.

identifierCode.label: Last 4 identifier
identifierCode.description: Required. Use the last 4 digits or characters from the patient's MRN, file, or another local identifier.

bedId.label: Bed
bedId.description: Only currently available beds are listed. Choose Staging to keep the patient unassigned.

PatientSheet.privacyNote: Patients kept in Staging can still be matched locally by initials and the last-4 identifier.

toasts.missingContext: Select an organization and sign in before saving patients.
toasts.requiredFields: Full name, last 4 identifier, diagnosis, and admission date are required.
toasts.invalidIdentifierCode: The last 4 identifier must be exactly 4 letters or digits.
toasts.saveError: Unable to save the patient workflow record.
toasts.trialLimitReached: The free-trial patient limit has been reached. Upgrade to Premium to add more patients.
toasts.bedOccupied: That bed is already assigned to another patient.
toasts.crossOrganization: You cannot update a patient outside your organization.

SettingsLayout.title: Clinic settings
SettingsLayout.description: Configure tenant-specific conventions, ward structure, billing, and operational preferences for each clinic organization.

billing.label: Billing
billing.description: Subscription status, limits, and upgrade actions.

SettingsPage.operationsDescription: Manage tenant-level conventions, ward planning, and privacy-aware workstation tools from one settings surface.
SettingsPage.operationsBody: Use the secondary navigation to define clinical conventions and build the room layout used by the interactive ward map.
SettingsPage.operationsNote: Phase 5.2 extends the shared clinic settings document with a live ward layout editor that feeds the drag-and-drop patient board.
SettingsPage.localSyncDescription: Upload the hospital roster on each device to enable bedside full-name lookup without sending PII to the server.
SettingsPage.localSyncBody: This privacy engine stores imported bed or identifier mappings and manual patient-name lookups only in LocalStorage. Convex stays completely unaware of patient full names.

LocalSyncModal.title: Secure local roster sync
LocalSyncModal.description: Drop a hospital CSV to map bed placements or identifier-backed staged patients to full names on this workstation. Data stays on this device and never enters Convex.
LocalSyncModal.privacyDescription: The uploaded roster is stored only in browser LocalStorage. The backend remains limited to patient initials and operational data.

dropzone.active: Drop the CSV to import it
dropzone.idle: Drag and drop a CSV file
dropzone.expectation: Expecting "Patient Name" plus either "Bed Number" or both "Initials" and "Identifier Code".
dropzone.fileHint: CSV only, one file per import

summary.statusWithCounts: {bedCount} imported roster mappings and {patientCount} manual patient mappings are stored on this device.
summary.statusEmpty: No local patient roster has been synced yet.
summary.latestImportWithFile: {fileName} is the latest uploaded roster file.
summary.latestImportEmpty: No CSV has been imported during this session.

status.default: Upload a CSV with "Patient Name" plus either "Bed Number" or both "Initials" and "Identifier Code".
status.imported: Imported {count} local roster mappings to this device.
status.cleared: Local roster removed from this device.

toasts.synced: Local roster synced to this device.
toasts.cleared: Local roster cleared from this device.

errors.missingColumns: CSV must include "Patient Name" plus either "Bed Number" or both "Initials" and "Identifier Code" columns.
errors.noValidRows: No valid patient rows were found in the uploaded CSV.
errors.syncFailed: Unable to sync the local roster from this CSV.

state.title: Conventions
state.selectOrganization: Select a clinic organization to manage tenant-specific rules.

ConventionsPage.title: Clinical convention builder
ConventionsPage.description: Define when diagnoses or surgery terms should require a checklist item before the workflow can move forward.

status.rulesConfigured: {count, plural, one {# rule configured for this clinic.} other {# rules configured for this clinic.}}

empty.title: No conventions yet
empty.description: Start with a rule that maps a diagnosis or surgery keyword to a required checklist item.

toasts.selectOrganization: Select an organization before saving clinic settings.

RuleBuilderRow.title: Clinical requirement trigger
RuleBuilderRow.description: Match workflow requirements against diagnosis or surgery text.
RuleBuilderRow.sourceFieldHint: Choose the clinical note field to inspect

surgery.label: Surgery
surgery.description: Match against surgery notes or labels.

state.title: Ward map
state.selectOrganization: Select a clinic organization to edit room and bed capacity settings.

WardMapSettingsPage.title: Ward layout builder
WardMapSettingsPage.description: Define rooms and bed counts here, then use the main ward map to drag patients between the generated bed slots.

empty.title: No rooms configured yet
empty.description: Add each room you want represented in the interactive ward map, then save to generate bed slots for patient placement.

toasts.selectOrganization: Select an organization before saving the ward layout.
toasts.saveError: Unable to save the ward layout.

state.title: Billing
state.selectOrganization: Select a clinic organization to manage subscription settings.
state.loadingUsage: Loading subscription status and patient usage...

BillingPage.description: Manage the commercial layer for WardOS, including PLG limits and the future Premium billing flow.

currentStatus.label: Current status
currentStatus.active: Premium billing is active for this clinic organization.
currentStatus.trial: This clinic is still on the free commercial tier.

patientUsage.label: Patient usage
patientUsage.locked: The soft lock is active. Existing data stays visible, but patient-writing actions are paused.
patientUsage.unlocked: The clinic can continue admitting patients until the free limit is reached.

items.unlimitedPatients: Unlimited active patient workflows beyond the free PLG threshold.
items.iyzico: Iyzico checkout scaffolding with callback-based Premium activation.
items.privacy: Zero-liability privacy model preserved with local full-name storage.

BillingUpgradeCard.title: Upgrade to Premium
BillingUpgradeCard.description: Start the Iyzico checkout flow for this clinic organization and unlock Premium immediately after successful payment verification.
BillingUpgradeCard.body: Premium removes the 50-patient PLG cap while keeping the existing tenant-aware and privacy-preserving architecture unchanged.

checkout.title: Iyzico checkout
checkout.description: Complete the secure payment form below. You will return to Billing automatically after Iyzico posts the callback.

toasts.activated: WardOS Premium has been activated for this clinic.
toasts.verificationError: Iyzico payment verification did not complete successfully.
toasts.initializeError: Unable to initialize the Iyzico checkout.
toasts.missingCheckoutContent: No Iyzico checkout content was returned.
toasts.initialized: Iyzico checkout initialized. Complete the payment below.

UpgradeBanner.title: You have reached the 50-patient free trial limit.
UpgradeBanner.description: Upgrade to Premium to continue admitting patients and moving beds while keeping all current data available in read-only mode.

state.title: Visit Mode
state.loadingOrganization: Loading organization context for mobile rounds...
state.selectOrganization: Select a clinic organization to load the current rounding list.
state.loadingVisitSheet: Loading patients and clinic settings for visit-sheet generation...

VisitPage.title: Mobile clinical rounds
VisitPage.description: Large on-screen cards keep bedside review readable, while print mode swaps to a dense black-and-white A4 visit sheet.

empty.title: No patients on the current rounding list
empty.description: Add patient records in the census first, then print the visit sheet when the list is ready for rounds.
empty.note: If a ward layout has not been configured yet, the list will fall back to natural bed sorting.

PrintableVisitSheet.title: Visit Sheet
PrintableVisitSheet.description: Dense A4 rounding list for bedside review.
PrintableVisitSheet.empty: No patients available for the active organization.

metadata.title: WardOS | Mobile Clinical Rounds & Visit Sheets
metadata.description: WardOS helps clinical teams run mobile rounds, real-time ward maps, and one-click visit-sheet printing without sending full patient names to the server.

hero.title: Mobile clinical rounds, real-time ward maps, and printable visit sheets in one privacy-safe workspace.
hero.description: WardOS gives clinical teams a bedside-first operating system for patient tracking. Run rounds on mobile, print a dense A4 visit sheet in one click, and keep full patient names off the server by design.

adoption.title: Built for rounds, not generic spreadsheets
adoption.description: WardOS combines bedside readability, print readiness, and commercial self-serve onboarding for modern clinical teams.

points.launchFast: Launch a clinic in minutes with a product-led free tier.
points.upgradeWhenReady: Upgrade only when the active patient census outgrows the free limit.
points.keepModel: Keep the same privacy model, visit-sheet flow, and ward map after conversion.

wardMap.title: Real-time Ward Map
wardMap.description: Move patients across configured beds in real time with a tenant-aware ward board that stays aligned to each clinic's own room layout.

visitSheet.title: One-click Visit Sheet
visitSheet.description: Switch from bedside mobile cards to a dense A4 rounding list instantly, so teams can print the visit sheet the moment they need paper backup.

privacy.title: Zero-Liability Privacy
privacy.description: WardOS keeps full names local to each workstation, which dramatically reduces backend liability while preserving clinical usability on the floor.

cta.title: Launch WardOS across every clinical service today.
cta.description: Start on the free tier, prove workflow value during rounds, then upgrade to Premium only when patient volume requires it.

state.restrictedDescription: This route is reserved for the WardOS super admin account.
state.loadingMetrics: Loading organization billing and patient metrics...

SuperAdminPage.title: WardOS tenant dashboard
SuperAdminPage.description: Review clinic usage, subscription health, and PLG conversion signals across the entire commercial footprint.

table.title: Tenant clinics
table.description: All organizations, commercial status, and live patient counts from the product-led growth layer.
table.caption: Commercial overview across all tenant clinics.
table.emptyCaption: No organizations have been provisioned yet.
